problem_statement: Nested Mind exposes a branch-protection reconciliation loop that compares desired protected-branch policy to observed GitHub state, builds a protected-branch REST payload, and records a reconcile receipt. Mullu Control Plane has token-exchange, check-run, and action-execution receipt boundaries, but no dedicated receipt planner that binds branch-protection policy hash, observed drift, reconcile actions, payload hash, approval evidence, token-exchange receipt, action-execution receipt, 2xx response status, and response hash before an apply-approved branch-protection reconcile claim is admitted.
success_criteria: Branch-protection reconcile plans build deterministic protected-branch endpoint, method, policy hash, payload hash, plan hash, drift, and required action evidence
Observed branch-protection compliance emits an explicit no-op receipt and observed drift emits explicit reconcile actions
Apply-approved mode blocks external apply admission when observed branch-protection state already satisfies the desired policy
Missing observed branch-protection state remains explicit rather than silently assuming compliance
Plan-only and dry-run modes perform no GitHub network call, authenticate no request, store no raw token, and cannot claim live apply response evidence

Apply-approved mode requires operator approval, GitHub App token-exchange receipt ref, GitHub action-execution receipt ref, 2xx response status, and response payload hash before an external reconcile claim is admitted
Raw token, JWT, or private-key shaped material in metadata or refs blocks receipt admission with explicit causal reasons
The branch-protection reconcile receipt is schema-backed, indexed in the governance protocol manifest, and included in proof coverage matrix witnesses
No live GitHub API call, branch protection mutation, check-run mutation, workflow dispatch, deployment, or production readiness claim is introduced
constraints: all apply-approved claims must bind external action-execution evidence instead of performing the GitHub branch-protection mutation in the planner
apply-approved claims must not admit external mutation when observed branch-protection state already satisfies policy
plan-only and dry-run modes must remain free of external effects and response evidence
observed state must be explicit when present and missing observed state must be represented as a bounded drift condition
response payload hashes must be sha256-prefixed hex digests
response status must be 2xx before apply-approved admission
raw token, JWT, or private-key shaped material must fail closed
receipt generation must be deterministic and schema-valid
evidence_required: standalone SDLC requirement and design validation receipt
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
